title: JMI Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Primary Teacher, Nursery Teacher and More Posts
post_name: Primary Teacher, Nursery Teacher and More
short_info: Jamia Millia Islamia (JMI) Guest Teacher Notification 2026 has been released on the official website jmi.ac.in. A total of 6 vacancies have been announced through the JMI Guest Teacher Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduate degrees, Diplomas in Education, Senior Secondary Certificates.
qualification.details: Guest Adult Education Teacher: Graduate in any school with 50% marks. Diploma in ETE/B.Ed./Moallim with 50% of marks. Ability to teach in Urdu and Hindi medium. Two years' experience of working with children and mothers in any recognized Institution or NGO of repute. Only women candidates are eligible. Guest Primary Teacher: Senior Secondary School Certificate with 50% marks or Intermediate with 50% marks or its equivalent. Pass in the Central Teacher Eligibility Test (CTET) conducted by the CBSE. Competence to teach through Hindi & English medium. Desirable: Knowledge of Computer Application, Ability to read and write Urdu. Only Women candidates are eligible. Guest Nursery Teacher: Senior Secondary School Certificate or its equivalent with at least 50% marks in aggregate from a Recognized Board/ University. Diploma/Certificate in Nursery Education/Training from recognized institute OR B.Ed. (Nursery). Ability to read and write Urdu. Only Women candidates are eligible. Guest Craft Teacher (Cutting & Tailoring): At least Second class secondary school certificate with Urdu or its equivalent from a recognized Board/University. Certificate in the Cutting Tailoring and Embroidery with Teacher Training Certificate from ITI or equivalent Diploma Certificate from recognized institute/ Polytechnic in the tread concerned.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for JMI Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
